/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC  -Wall -Werror -Wextra -pedantic -fno-strict-aliasing -O2 -O3 -DNDEBUG -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/vibra_shared.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libvibra.so -o libvibra.so CMakeFiles/vibra_shared.dir/vibra.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibra_shared.dir/algorithm/signature.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibra_shared.dir/algorithm/frequency.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibra_shared.dir/algorithm/signature_generator.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibra_shared.dir/audio/wav.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vibra_shared.dir/audio/downsampler.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/vibra_shared.dir/__/third-party/kissfft/kiss_fft.c.o" "CMakeFiles/vibra_shared.dir/__/third-party/kissfft/kiss_fftr.c.o"  -lm -lgcc_s_asneeded -lgcc_s_asneeded
